name: material-3-md3-workflows
description: Material Design 3 workflow plugin for Codex with Compose-first guidance, optional deterministic MCP support, and MD3 audit/remediation outputs.

interface.shortDescription: MD3 component, theme, layout, scaffold, and audit workflows
interface.longDescription: Repo-local Material Design 3 capability for Codex. Ships a canonical MD3 skill bundle, optional deterministic lookup/scoring MCP support, and release-proof packaging discipline.
defaultPrompt: Design a Compose Material 3 screen shell for this feature.
Generate an MD3 theme scaffold from this seed color.
Audit this UI against Material Design 3 and suggest minimal fixes.
